sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this title

special_mechanics.name: wall-jumping
special_mechanics.description: Multiple characters can cling to and climb walls; Beast, Psylocke, Wolverine, and Nightcrawler all possess wall-crawling/climbing abilities

special_mechanics.name: double-jump
special_mechanics.description: Nightcrawler and Wolverine can perform double jumps; Psylocke can also double jump

special_mechanics.name: flight/hovering
special_mechanics.description: Magneto can hover in mid-air and perform attacks from this position

special_mechanics.name: teleportation
special_mechanics.description: Nightcrawler's mutant power is an explosive teleportation that can be charged for greater range and damage

special_mechanics.name: diving_attack
special_mechanics.description: Beast possesses a powerful diving attack; Psylocke and Nightcrawler can perform diving attacks

special_mechanics.name: charged_attacks
special_mechanics.description: Some characters can unleash charged-up versions of mutant attack powers which deal more damage and/or have wider area of effect; character must remain stationary while charging

tier_notes: Tier 2: Qualitative/empirical data only. No precise physics parameters documented. Movement characteristics derived from character ability descriptions in gameplay documentation.
sources_used: Wikipedia - X-Men 2: Clone Wars (Gameplay and Characters sections)
